meta.note: Join key (sid, name). "confirmed" = present in both R12 and R13 with delta>0. "new_only" = in R13 only (could be a true newcomer OR a rename вҖ” their R12 entry disappeared). "departed" = in R12 only (quit, or renamed and now appears under new_only). Mass renames are common; confirmed is the trustworthy participation signal.
